title: IDF Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) killed in Hezbollah drone strike; 6 wounded
snippet: Sgt. Idan Fooks, 19, of 7th Armored Brigade's 77th Battalion, from Petah Tikva, killed by Hezbollah explosive drone in southern Lebanon. 1 officer + 3 troops seriously wounded, 1 moderately, 1 lightly. 3rd soldier killed during ceasefire, 1st in direct Hezbollah attack. IDF launched retaliatory wave of strikes.
tag_reason: New: First IDF soldier killed in direct Hezbollah attack during ceasefire
